what: Pre-result adversarial review of the B2-adaptive harness/prereg/verdict machinery, run WHILE the scored run trained (review of the instrument, blind to the final verdict; 2 of 4 cells existed when it launched)
method: five independent attack lenses (impl-correctness, stats-verdict, prereg-integrity, artifact-hunt, certifier-readiness), each finding then passed to an independent refutation agent
note_on_lost_verifiers: each unverified major-class finding had a verified sibling refutation covering its substance (bite-gate-bias family refuted on inverted-bias grounds: the excluded cell was a would-be SURVIVES cell; delta-grounding family refuted on operand-pair precedent); adjudicated by the parent agent before the RESULT was written

confirmed_findings.title: step-0 subspace is recomputed by recipe, not persisted-and-reloaded; RESULT must not say 'B2's exact subspace'
confirmed_findings.resolution: RESULT words it as recomputed with the identical recipe on the identical clean checkpoint; clean metrics reproduce B2's to 4 decimals

confirmed_findings.title: verified non-defects: refit rebinding real, no train-state corruption, resid_all peft-safe, smoke globals visible, batch-RNG parity with static B2 holds; training loop otherwise line-identical to B2
confirmed_findings.resolution: coverage record; single-variable claim holds at code level

confirmed_findings.title: per-re-fit l_erase trajectory not persisted (only the endpoint tail)
confirmed_findings.resolution: RESULT scopes all loss-history claims to the stored train_hist_tail; future harnesses should persist full hist

confirmed_findings.title: re-fit counting hazard: 5 re-fits (steps 50-250) plus the inherited step-0 subspace = six subspaces; prose saying 'six re-fits' would unground against n_refits=5
confirmed_findings.resolution: RESULT uses the stored-scalar convention: n_refits=5, step-0 subspace inherited

adopted_disclosures: the inadmissible NO-BITE cell is disclosed with its full row incl. its private-13 read (the strongest in the run) - exclusion is anti-SURVIVES
static-vs-adaptive comparisons stated as operand pairs from the two receipt JSONs, never bare deltas
union-of-past-subspaces (accumulating) eraser added to the owed-attacker list
knowledge-replay dominance note: one attacked cell's knowledge read exceeded the clean model's
